---
title: "My Bookshelf"
---

<div class="bookshelf-container">

<!-- TOP SHELF -->

<div class="bookshelf">

<div class="book">
<a href="blog/beautiful_life_review.qmd">
<img src="images/beautiful_life.png">
</a>
<div class="stars">⭐⭐⭐⭐</div>
</div>

<div class="book">
<a href="blog/society_review.qmd">
<img src="images/society.png">
</a>
<div class="stars">⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</div>
</div>

<div class="book">
<a href="blog/lover_review.qmd">
<img src="images/lover.png">
</a>
<div class="stars">⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</div>
</div>

</div>

<!-- SECOND SHELF -->

<div class="bookshelf">

<div class="book">
<a href="blog/bright_creatures_review.qmd">
<img src="images/bright_creatures.png">
</a>
<div class="stars">⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</div>
</div>

<div class="book">
<a href="blog/jaguars_review.qmd">
<img src="images/jaguars.png">
</a>
<div class="stars">⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐</div>
</div>

<div class="book">
<a href="blog/martyr_review.qmd">
<img src="images/martyr.png">
</a>
<div class="stars">⭐⭐⭐⭐</div>
</div>

</div>

</div>
